heading: Study and reports on defaults and foreclosures
label: 5116 Study and reports on defaults and foreclosures

Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the designated transfer date, see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 111–203section 1100H of Pub. L. 111–203section 552a of Title 5

children.heading: Study required
children.label: a Study required
children.text: The Director shall conduct an extensive study of the root causes of default and foreclosure of home loans, using as much empirical data as is available.

children.heading: Preliminary report to Congress
children.label: b Preliminary report to Congress
children.text: Not later than 6 months after , the Director shall submit to Congress a preliminary report regarding the study required by this section.July 30, 2008

children.heading: Final report to Congress
children.label: c Final report to Congress
children.text: Not later than 12 months after , the Director shall submit to Congress a final report regarding the results of the study required by this section, which shall include any recommended legislation relating to the study, and recommendations for best practices and for a process to provide targeted assistance to populations with the highest risk of potential default or foreclosure.July 30, 2008
